Emma Roth / The Verge:
Sony says it plans to raise the price of its PlayStation 5 consoles globally beginning on April 2; the PS5 will cost $650, PS5 Digital $600, and PS5 Pro $900  —  The PS5 Pro will be a $900 console as of April 2nd. … Sony is raising the price of its PlayStation 5 consoles globally starting April 2nd.

items.title: Bring the ultimate cinema experience anywhere with the Anker Nebula X1 Pro projector at a new $3,999 low ($1,000 off)
items.summary:
As part of the Amazon Big Spring Sale, the official Anker storefront is offering the best price yet on its new Soundcore Nebula X1 Pro Triple Laser 4K Home & Outdoor Cinema Projector for $3,999 shipped. Since its reveal and release at CES 2026, this all-new projector has mostly stayed at its $4,999 MSRP, though we have seen one previous discount to $4,299 that occurred during the first half of February. If you held off on buying it then, you’re getting an even larger 20% markdown here for the rest of March, cutting $1,000 off the cost for a new all-time low price. What’s more, there’s even a bundle option for the projector and a 200-inch inflatable screen, giving you a mobile theater unlike any other at $4,999 shipped, down from $6,998. For cheaper alternatives for your mobile streamings/movie nights, be sure to check out the Anker Nebula roundup of projectors and accessories with up to 35% discounts starting from $32.

items.title: Gotrax’s 55-mile range R2 folding e-bike at $649 ($251 off) or the 18-mile XR Elite Max e-scooter at a $320 low, more from $100
items.summary:
As part of the ongoing Amazon Big Spring Sale, you can currently find Gotrax’s various e-bikes and e-scooters with up to 28% discounts hitting them starting from $100. Among the many models we’re seeing in this sale, a top pick for folks on a commuting budget is Gotrax’s R2 Folding e-bike down at $649 shipped from a $900 full price tag. Over the last year, discounts have mostly kept prices above $656, though there was a one-time fall to the $638 low for Cyber Monday. That being said, the deal here gives you the next-best price with a $251 markdown that lands it just $11 above that one-time low. It’s a handy means to travel up to 55 miles using the pedal assistance, maxing out at 20 MPH speeds. Of course, if you want a cheaper option for smaller commutes around neighborhoods, college campuses, and the like, be sure to check out the 18-mile traveling XR ELITE MAX Electric Scooter down at its $320 low from $420. You’ll find many more models rounded up below for your one-stop shopping needs.

items.title: Lenovo’s Idea Tab Pro 12.7-inch 3K Android tablet with stylus delivers some serious value while it’s down to $237.50 (40% off)
items.summary:
Over at Lenovo, you’ll find the brand’s Idea Tab Pro Android tablet currently going for $237.49 shipped. Don’t forget to enter promo code EXTRAFIVE during checkout to see the discounted price. This particular tablet, which comes bundled with the Lenovo Tab Pen Plus stylus, typically sells for $390, so you’re looking at a straight-up $152 discount right now. We’ve typically see the brand’s more affordable Idea Tab models score notable price drops, but this Pro model doesn’t see nearly as many discounts. It’s only been discounted once in the past, and today’s offer beats that by $10 to mark a new best price. Best Buy currently lists this base variant for $310 with a lighter discount, but Lenovo’s offer with the above-mentioned promo code knocks a significant chunk off the regular price to land at a new all-time low.

items.title: Originally $1,300 Snapdragon X Elite Surface Laptop with 15-inch 2K touchscreen is down to $900 (Today only, $400 off)
items.summary:
Today only, as part of its Deals of the Day offers, Best Buy has listed Microsoft’s Snapdragon X Elite-powered 15-inch touchscreen Surface Laptop for $899.99 shipped. This is the first Snapdragon X Elite-powered Surface notebook that originally launched with a $1,300 price tag. It has more recently been selling closer to $1,200 at Amazon, so today’s deal delivers a straight $300 discount off its typical going rate. That also marks a $400 drop from its original list price, bringing this touchscreen model down to one of the lowest prices we have tracked to date – now sitting just $72 above its all-time low. It also remains one of the more capable Snapdragon X Elite Surface machines available, offering stronger performance than the 2025 Surface Laptop models that arrived with the more modest 8-core Snapdragon X Plus chip. Head below for more details.
